combined_text:
--- Main Page ---
Home - Good Word Brewing & Public House
Reservations
Enjoy your time with us and
each other
.
Let us fill your glass, and clear the plates.
Good Word Brewing & Public House starts with a village and the folks who make up the community. We are a collection of neighbors, it’s leaders, it’s youth, and it’s misfits. All are welcome.
Good Word is a place to meet new friends, reconnect with old ones, to share stories, to celebrate, to propose, to commiserate, to communicate. We serve delicious locally sourced food and the absolute best beer we can produce. We pride ourselves on empathetic and patient service, however these are all just a backdrop intent on not interrupting your experience.
Because we are driven by the community, we are a Public House.

“Good Word is a restaurant by the community, for the community, and in support of the community. Chef Crain and his kitchen leverage direct relationships with local and family farms to bring their neighborhood the best possible choices.”
–
Farmd
, 2018
“Good Word has quickly established itself as a place that worships quality beer, playful food, and old-fashioned hospitality.”
–
Atlanta Magazine
, 2018
“It is evident that Skinner and DiMatteo genuinely care about their guests, taking the time to greet and speak to each one of their patrons. “
–

The Cocktails - Good Word Brewing & Public House
Cocktails
Our Homemade Concoctions

All
28

Classics
15

8

Signatures
5
A donut before Whistler
Laird's Applejack, Wheatley vodka, fino sherry, maple, pecan, brown sugar, vanilla, absinthe & chocolate bitters.
Aviation
gin, maraschino liqueur, creme de violette, lemon
Bee’s Knees
Gin, honey syrup, lemon juice
Cada Dia
Mezcal, Lime, Agave
Dark and Stormy
Rum, Lime, Ginger Beer
Death by Cherries
Corazon blanco, lazzaroni amaretto, aztec chocolate bitters, creme de cacao, cherry syrup, lemon.
French 75
Gin, Sparkling White wine, simple syrup, lemon juice
GreyJoy
Gin, Creme De Violet, Elderflower, Lemon, Cava
In The Navy
Jamaican Rum, Navy strength gin, Fernet, Sour, Velvet falernum, Angostura bitters
Jungle Bird
Rum, Campari, Lime, Pineapple, Demerara syrup
Last Word
Gin, Maraschino, green chartreuse, lime
Margarita
Tequila, agave nectar, lime juice
Matcha Libre
Lemon Hart Blackpool, Murrell's row eno amaro, coconut, lime, matcha, heavy cream.
Mojito
white rum, mint, simple syrup, lime juice, sugar, club soda
Naked and Famous
Mezcal, Yellow Chartreuse, Aperol, Lime
Negroni
Gin, Carpano Antica, Campari
Not that kind of party
Larceny small batch, Loch Lomond original single malt scotch, pineapple shrub, Pierre Ferrand dry curaçao, Jerry Thomas bitters.
Nuevo Paraiso
Los vecinos del campo, punt e mes, Tanteo habanero, agave, aztec chocolate bitters, poblano.
Oaxacan Sol
mezcal, tequila, honey, lime, bitters
Old Fashioned
Rye whiskey, bitters blend, simple syrup
Paloma
tequila, agave, salt solution, grapefruit, lime juice
Planter’s Rum Punch
white rum, spiced rum pineapple, sour mix, Angostura bitters
Side Car
Cognac, Cointreau, lemon
That’s my Sloe Jam!
Murrell's Row GinGin, Hayman's Sloe gin, rosemary, creme de cassis, lemon, black cherry bitters.
The Best Root West
High West double rye, blue note rye, root beer bitters, High wire southern amaro, Montenegro, Demerara, club soda.
There’s always money in the banana stand
Evan Williams B.I.B., brown butter, creme de banana, walnut liqueur, chocolate bitters.
Where Eagles Rare
eagle rare, cynar, amaro di angostura
Whiskey Sour
bourbon, luxardo maraschino, sour mix with or without egg white
*contains raw egg

📣 Saturday February 28th we are hosting our 4th Puerto Rican Pilsner Party! 🥳 We will be releasing “No Mirrors”, our 5.3% Puerto Rican Pilsner, both in cans and on draft. German malt, rice and plantains in the mash. German yeast, and Saaz hops. A collab we remade with our friends from St Louis; Little […]

We invite you to join us Thursday 3.26.26 at 6:00 pm for a 6 course brewer & chef led beer dinner with one of our favorites - Zillicoah! We will have the folks from Zillicoah here to share some stories and delicious beer! Chef and Todd will all be here as well talking beer and […]

28
Join us for the 6th installment of LITTLE BEER! Little Beer is a nationally acclaimed lager festival recognized by USA Today and Hop Culture as a must-attend event. meta.meta_description: We are a full-service restaurant and brewery located in Downtown Duluth, GA that serves locally sourced food and the best beer we can brew.
